executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Login credentials: email = admin@sigp.gob.pe or pmo@sigp.gob.pe, password = Admin123! or Password123!. The app is in Spanish. After login the user is redirected to /dashboard. Navigation to actividades is via sidebar menu item "POI" -> "Actividades". The "Nueva Actividad" button is typically in the top right of the activities list page. For creating subactividad, navigate to an existing activity detail page and look for "Nueva Subactividad" or a subactividades section/tab.
